stractNotConvertibleToken A token that contains a label/token pairs. This pair is one of the choices in a union type, but the exact type is not stored in this class. Operations on union tokens may require that they have the same field in among the

equire that they have the same field in among the possible choices. Since: Ptolemy II 5.2 Version: $Id: UnionToken.java,v 1.10 2006/08/21 23:53:42 cxh Exp $ Author: Yuhong Xiong, Steve Neuendorffer, Elaine Cheong, Edward Lee See Also: Serialized For
